input: I was charged twice for my July invoice — $49 each time. Please refund one of the charges.
The export button on the reports page does nothing when I click it. The browser console shows a TypeError.
It would be great if the dashboard had a dark mode — half my team works nights and the white background is rough.
I have not been able to log in since this morning, and the password reset email never arrives.
The app crashed while I was in the middle of paying, and now I see two pending charges on my card.
